zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth de Burghersh於1342年5月出生在英國英格蘭賀福爾艾維亞斯時，她的父親Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh55歲，母親Countess Elizabeth de Verdun37歲。她於1347年11月12日與Edward Despenser II在愛爾蘭結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和8個女兒的父母。她去世於1409年7月26日在英國英格蘭格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth de Burghersh于1342年5月出生在英国英格兰賀福爾艾維亞斯时，她的父亲Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh55岁，母亲Countess Elizabeth de Verdun37岁。她于1347年11月12日与Edward Despenser II在爱尔兰结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和8个女儿的父母。她去世于1409年7月26日在英国英格兰格盧斯特斯爾福可斯波利享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth de Burghersh was born in May 1342, in Ewias, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, was 55 and her mother, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, was 37. She married Edward Despenser II on 12 November 1347, in Ireland. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 8 daughters. She died on 26 July 1409, in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth de Burghersh est née en mai 1342, à Ewias, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Despenser II le 12 novembre 1347, à Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 8 filles. Elle est décédée le 26 juillet 1409, à Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 67 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth de Burghersh im Mai 1342 in Ewias, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh 55 und ihre Mutter Countess Elizabeth de Verdun 37. Sie hat am 12. November 1347 in Irland Edward Despenser II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 8 Töchter. Sie starb am 26. Juli 1409 im Alter von 67 Jahren in Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Burghersh è nata il nel maggio 1342 nel Ewias, Herefordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, aveva 55 anni e sua madre, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, aveva 37 anni. Lei sposato Edward Despenser II il 12 novembre 1347, nel Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 8 figlie. Morì il 26 luglio 1409, nel Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Burghershが1342年5月にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアエウィアスで生まれた時，父Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghershは55歳，母Countess Elizabeth de Verdunは37歳であった。1347年11月12日にアイルランドでEdward Despenser IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と8人の娘の親であった。彼女は1409年7月26日にイギリスイギリスグロウセステルシュアイアテウケスブリーで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth de Burghersh(이)가 1342년 5월 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 위아스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh(은)는 55세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Countess Elizabeth de Verdun(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 1347년 11월 12일 아일랜드에서 Edward Despenser II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 여덟 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1409년 7월 26일 영국 잉글랜드 그루스스터실르 튜케스버이에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth de Burghersh nasceu em maio de 1342, em Ewias, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, tinha 55 anos e sua mãe, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Despenser II em 12 de novembro de 1347, em Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 8 filhas. Ela faleceu em 26 de julho de 1409, em Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth de Burghersh родилась май 1342 г. в местности ювяс, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Despenser II 12 ноября 1347 г. в местности Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 8 дочерей. Она умерла 26 июля 1409 г. в местности тюкесбури, глоусестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Elizabeth de Burghersh nació en mayo de 1342, en Ewias, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Bartholomew de Burghersh 1st Baron Burghersh, tenía 55 años y su mamá, Countess Elizabeth de Verdun, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Edward Despenser II el 12 de noviembre de 1347, en Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 8 hijas. Murió el 26 de julio de 1409, en Tewkesbury, Gloucestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 67 años.
